title: Trump’s Approval Sinks Amid Unpopular War, Darkening G.O.P. Prospects
summary: With the midterms nearing, President Trump’s approval rating has hit a second-term low as voters question his handling of the economy, according to the latest New York Times/Siena poll.

title: A Crack in the Polling Floor Puts Trump in New Territory
summary: A 37 percent approval rating in a new Times/Siena poll suggests the G.O.P. is facing a big midterm problem despite recent redistricting gains.

title: Trump’s Approval Rating Hits New Low, and Ebola Outbreak Declared a Global Health Emergency
summary: Plus, inside the closed-door talks over Greenland.

title: L.I.R.R. Riders Stranded by Strike Have Few Commute Alternatives. Here’s What To Know.
summary: New York transit officials say the alternate travel options they’ve arranged for the Long Island Rail Road strike could not accommodate all commuters.

title: In Closed-Door Talks, U.S. Demands a Major Role in Greenland
summary: Greenlandic officials worry about the direction of the negotiations aimed at defusing President Trump’s threats to seize their island. But they have little leverage.

title: Brookings Institution Report: Over 100,000 Family Separations in Trump Crackdown
summary: The Brookings Institution suggests that federal statistics are an undercount because immigrant parents are not being asked about or not disclosing their American children.

title: Conspiracy Trial Will Test Trump’s Aggressive Tactics Against Protesters
summary: Prosecutors in Spokane, Wash., are trying three activists who they say conspired to impede federal officers. Legal experts call it a stretch.

title: Catastrophe Is Emerging in the World’s Most Vulnerable Places
summary: The humanitarian relief system, decimated by cuts, faces a grave challenge as the Middle East war causes soaring costs for food, fuel and fertilizer.

title: How the Music of ‘Schmigadoon!’ Echoes Broadway’s Past
summary: The composer Cinco Paul discusses the clever references to classic musicals everywhere you look (and hear) in his new Broadway show.

title: What to Know About the Latest Ebola Outbreak
summary: The World Health Organization declared a global health emergency after about 80 people died from the virus in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

title: Americans Are Among Those Affected by Ebola Outbreak, C.D.C. Says
summary: A small number of U.S. citizens have been directly affected by the outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, the C.D.C. said on Sunday.

title: Trump Warns Iran the ‘Clock Is Ticking’ as Tensions Surge Again in Middle East
summary: The president has sought to force Iran to accept his terms on its nuclear program or else face renewed war. An emboldened Iran has rebuffed Trump’s demands.

title: Blocked Strait of Hormuz Leads to New Opportunities for Syria
summary: The latest war in the Middle East has created new economic opportunities for Syria thanks to its geography.

title: Oil Prices Climb and Bonds Falter as Iran War Raises Inflation Fears
summary: Stocks and bonds wavered after President Trump issued a new warning to Iran.

title: G7 Finance Ministers Look to Contain Iran Economic Fallout
summary: Top policymakers were expected to discuss rising energy prices and sanctions policy at a critical summit in Paris this week.

title: Actually, Democracy Dies in H.R.
summary: New research sheds light on how mediocre employees help would-be authoritarians maintain power.

title: NextEra Energy to Acquire Dominion, Creating a Utility Giant
summary: The deal combining the companies in Florida and Virginia comes as demand for power is soaring, largely because of the rapid growth of A.I. data centers.

title: He Shut Liquor Stores and Banned Abortion, All for the Glory of Russia
summary: A firebrand governor aims to transform his region into a laboratory for the Kremlin’s reactionary ideals.

title: Josh Tyrangiel book excerpt: How OpenAI and Khan Academy Made a Chatbot
summary: Inside a collaboration to bring artificial intelligence into the classroom.

title: Bulgaria Hopes Eurovision Win Will Show Its Strength as a Continental Player
summary: Recent months have brought remarkable change in the Eastern European nation, which has just adopted the euro and forced the resignation of a leader through major protests.

title: When Tornado Weather Hits, These Scientists Break Out the Colored Pencils
summary: With a battery of modern technology at their fingertips, meteorologists often turn first to an old-fashioned tracking technique.

title: Severe Weather, Including Hail and Tornadoes, Could Rattle the U.S. Midwest
summary: Some of the most severe weather in days could hit Monday afternoon, meteorologists said. Tornadoes and large hail are possible.

title: Trump Doesn’t Know What Power Is
summary: The war has revealed the true puniness of Trump’s power

title: The Fighting Never Ends
summary: We look at what happens when countries say they’re going to stop shooting at each other.

title: The Quest for Clean Hydrogen Moves Underground
summary: The dream of clean hydrogen has tantalized energy experts for years, but producing it has been tough. Many start-ups think the answer could lie beneath our feet.

title: Mamdani’s First City-Owned Grocery Store Is Planned for the South Bronx
summary: Mayor Zohran Mamdani plans to announce that the store will open in the Hunts Point neighborhood next year. Some merchants are pushing back.

title: Bodies of Four Italian Divers Found in Maldives Cave
summary: The discovery comes after days of searching by an international team of rescue divers. A fifth body was recovered last week.
